response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is heavily focused on web, mobile, and full-stack software development with minimal evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in diverse projects
Proven ability to ship complex systems and optimize performance in high-throughput environments
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling experience
Lacks exposure to GPU architecture, deep-learning workload optimization, or hardware-software co-design
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware performance experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU performance optimization background
BS degree with insufficient relevant experience
